name: jupyterlab-language-pack-zh-tw
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "jupyterlab-language-pack" %}
{% set version = "4.3.post0" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}-{{ locale|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install "./{{ locale }}" -vv --no-deps

requirements:
  host:
    - hatchling >=1.4.0
    - jupyterlab-translate >=1.2.0
    - pip
    - python >=3.6
  run:
    - python >=3.6

test:
  requires:
    - pip
  commands:
    - pip check

about:
  home: https://github.com/jupyterlab/language-packs
  summary: JupyterLab {{ locale }} Language Pack
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_family: BSD
  license_file: {{ locale }}/LICENSE.txt
  doc_url: https://jupyterlab.readthedocs.io/
  dev_url: https://github.com/jupyterlab/language-packs

extra:
  feedstock-name: jupyterlab-language-packs
  recipe-maintainers:
    - blink1073
    - fcollonval
    - goanpeca
    - krassowski
